limitations: sampled process tree; sub-interval descendants may be missed

A.title: Auto cold and warm reseek
missing_capabilities: compressed fixture profiles are defined but not executed by this matrix
150/350/750 ms profile sweep and constrained absolute gates are not implemented
network-byte efficiency and generation-cluster report gates are incomplete
A.fail_closed_reason: The runnable WAV core proves the 20-pair/5-generation latency contract but cannot stand in for the complete A matrix.

B.title: Seek burst
missing_capabilities: wire first-plus-latest and obsolete-restart correlation are not exported
bounded backlog and second-pass network-byte gates are not implemented
B.fail_closed_reason: The runnable 20-target final-latency gate is diagnostic until wire and network invariants are evidenced.

C.title: Auto no-trigger
missing_capabilities: local/live/radio/unseekable and unsupported-mpv fixtures are not controllable through the harness
the complete exact-zero no-trigger matrix is absent
C.fail_closed_reason: Off is covered only as a control; the complete Auto no-trigger source matrix is unsupported.

D.title: Track churn and cleanup
missing_capabilities: the controller cannot inject ten-item replacement, Stop, crash, respawn, or daemon lifecycles safely
D.fail_closed_reason: Lifecycle fault orchestration is unavailable, so D must not run or pass by omission.

E.title: Cap and free space
missing_capabilities: safe filesystem fault and exact free-space boundary injection are not implemented
E.fail_closed_reason: Without deterministic storage fault injection the cap/floor safety contract cannot produce ship evidence.

F.title: Network resilience
missing_capabilities: ignored Range, 416, cancellation, and post-close transfer bounds are not runnable end to end
F.fail_closed_reason: The outage profile is diagnostic only and cannot represent the full F fault matrix.

G.title: Memory and I/O soak
missing_capabilities: the current soak lacks repeated seeks, OS pressure/dirty/writeback evidence, robust slope bootstrap, and post-close settle proof
G.fail_closed_reason: The 15-minute sampler duration is runnable but its evidence is insufficient for the complete G gates.

H.title: On worst case
missing_capabilities: sequential completion, early skip, and fast/constrained cross-product scenarios are absent
H.fail_closed_reason: The On core is diagnostic and cannot substitute for the H worst-case cross-product.

I.title: Managed cache-knob matrix
missing_capabilities: role-specific mpv knob injection and capability-gated hysteresis candidate execution are not implemented
I.fail_closed_reason: No managed knob candidate may be adopted until I is runnable across supported mpv lines.

required_runtime_checklist: album art off and on with Halfblocks plus every natively available protocol
long selected-row marquee at narrow and wide widths
every animation family at configured FPS bounds

scenarios.description: Empty queue, album art and animations disabled
Exact unmarked 32MiB/8MiB pair for diagnostic steady playback comparison; migration is not asserted while the defaults revision is dormant
Cache fields omitted; must converge to the selected migrated default
18-minute Range fixture under constrained bandwidth, outages, and backward seeks
20 warmups, then 20 by 200 updates plus draws, including deterministic reducer input, total allocation no-regression, and strict matched-control incremental animation churn
Three alternating 15-minute steady playback pairs per OS
Geometry-only process no-regression at 100x30 and 160x50; visual feature families remain a separate required runtime checklist
Seven paired steady-playback runs with the fixed balanced 20-of-40 animation profile at 30 fps
Seven paired steady-playback runs with the fixed heavy 20-of-40 animation profile at 30 fps
Three paired 15-minute runs measuring ytt-owned RSS with the fixed balanced half-animation profile
Off-role control on a one-hour deterministic Range fixture with cold, warm revisit, and no-wait burst operations
Auto candidate against an Off baseline on a one-hour deterministic Range fixture with cold, warm revisit, and no-wait burst operations
On candidate against an Off baseline on a one-hour deterministic Range fixture with cold, warm revisit, and no-wait burst operations
